gauge.name: San Gregorio Creek at San Gregorio

impacts.statement: Major flood stage.  Stage Road at San Gregorio Creek flooded and adjacent floodplain properties under 4 or more feet of water.
Moderate flood stage.  Adjacent floodplain under several feet of water.  Stage Road crossing is backwatered.

Minor flood stage.  Flood waters inundate floodplain upstream of Stage Road crossing, mainly on left bank side (as looking downstream).  NWS will issue a Flash Flood Warning if not yet already issued.
Monitor stage.  Water is 2.7 feet below adjacent floodplain properties.  NWS may issue a Flash Flood Watch if not yet already issued.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

gauge.forecastReliability: Graphical forecasts are not available during times of high water, forecast crest information can be found in the local WFO web page.
